Bash(matlab -batch "data = load\(''D:/FreeWalkOptomotor/data/2024_11_05/protocol_10/324_t4t5_kir/F/14_45_42/LOG_2024_11_05_14_45_42.mat''\); fprintf\(''\\n=== ALL VARIABLES ===\\n''\); disp\(fieldnames\(data\)\); fprintf\(''\\n=== CHECKING FOR METADATA ===\\n''\); for field = fieldnames\(data\)''; f = field{1}; v = data.\(f\); if isstruct\(v\) && numel\(v\) == 1; fprintf\(''\\n%s \(struct\):\\n'', f\); for sf = fieldnames\(v\)''; fprintf\(''  %s\\n'', sf{1}\); end; else; fprintf\(''%s: %s\\n'', f, class\(v\)\); end; end; exit;")

Bash(cmd /c "cd C:\\Users\\labadmin\\Documents\\GitHub\\freely-walking-optomotor\\python\\freely-walking-python && pixi run python -c ""import scipy.io as sio; import os; log_file = r''D:\\FreeWalkOptomotor\\data\\2025_07_11\\protocol_27\\jfrc100_es_shibire_kir\\F\\13_52_23\\LOG_2025_07_11_13_52_23.mat''; data = sio.loadmat\(log_file, squeeze_me=True, simplify_cells=True\); LOG = data[''LOG'']; meta = LOG[''meta''].item\(\); print\(''Fields:'', meta.dtype.names\); [print\(f''  {f} = {repr\(meta[f].item\(\)\)}''\) for f in [''func_name'', ''fly_strain'', ''fly_sex'']]""")
